title: Improved Lanterns
description: Gives your lanterns a lovely detailed appearance!
body:
Improved Lanterns aims to enhance the look of lanterns by adding detail that gives it a more nautical-like appearance!

This project is a continuation of my pack [Copper Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/copper-lanterns).
